options.title: GitLab Shared Templates
options.subtitle: Configure your templates repository and credentials
options.customDomainHelp: Leave blank if using the official gitlab.com instance. Include the scheme (https://).
options.repoUrlHelp: The full GitLab URL of the project containing your template markdown files (e.g. .md).
options.patHelp: Required if the repository is private. Token needs api or read_api scope.
options.insertionBehaviorHelp: Define whether selecting a template replaces the entire editor text or appends it at the cursor position.
options.enableLogging: Enable Developer Logging (Outputs logs to DevTools Console)
options.enableLoggingHelp: Check this box to enable verbose debugging logs in the browser console for DOM injection tracing.
options.needHelp: Need help? Check your GitLab repository permissions.
options.languageHelp: Choose the interface language for settings and dropdowns.

messages.requestingPermission: Requesting browser permission for custom domain...
messages.permissionDenied: Permission for {origin} was denied by the user.
messages.invalidRepoUrl: Could not parse a valid project path from the Repository URL.
messages.provideValidRepoUrl: Please provide a valid Repository URL before testing.

dropdown.extensionInactive: Extension background service inactive. Reload page.
dropdown.failedLoadTemplates: Failed to load templates. Check extension settings.
